zh.lifeSummary: 當James Butler於1437年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼卡藍時，他的父親Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter17歲，母親Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll22歲。他於1461年與Lady Sabh Kavanagh在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年4月16日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼卡藍享年50歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Butler于1437年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼卡藍时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter17岁，母亲Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll22岁。他于1461年与Lady Sabh Kavanagh在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年4月16日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼卡藍享年50岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Butler was born in 1437, in Callan, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter, was 17 and his mother, Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll, was 22. He married Lady Sabh Kavanagh in 1461, in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 16 April 1487, in Callan, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Butler est né en 1437, à Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Sabh Kavanagh en 1461, à Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 avril 1487, à Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Butler 1437 in Callan, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter 17 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll 22. Er hat 1461 in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland Lady Sabh Kavanagh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. April 1487 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Callan, County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Butler è nato il nel 1437 nel Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Sabh Kavanagh nel 1461, nel Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 aprile 1487, nel Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: James Butlerが1437年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーカランで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garterは17歳，母Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carrollは22歳であった。1461年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーゴウランでLady Sabh Kavanaghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年4月16日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーカランで50歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Butler(이)가 1437년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 캘런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1461년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이 가란에서 Lady Sabh Kavanagh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 4월 16일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 캘런에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Butler nasceu em 1437, em Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Sabh Kavanagh em 1461, em Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de abril de 1487, em Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Butler родился в 1437 г. в местности каллан, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Sabh Kavanagh в 1461 г. в местности гоуран, килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 апреля 1487 г. в местности каллан, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Butler nació en 1437, en Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Sabh Kavanagh en 1461, en Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de abril de 1487, en Callan, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
